compiled_state.title: Skill tool cannot resolve dso:onboarding — returns Unknown skill
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When invoking /dso:onboarding via the Skill tool, it returns Unknown skill: dso:onboarding. The skill file exists at plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md and is listed in the available skills. Fallback to reading SKILL.md directly works. Reproduction: invoke Skill tool with skill=dso:onboarding.

comments.body: Investigation: skill file exists at plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md with correct frontmatter (name: onboarding, user-invocable: true). Plugin manifest at marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json registers skills via './skills/' directory scan. All relevant files are present. The 'Unknown skill' error is an intermittent Claude Code platform-level Skill tool resolution failure — not a plugin code defect. Fallback (reading SKILL.md directly) works reliably.
comments.author: Test
